message: Operation 'logoutFromCollection' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. Description is completely missing. Added details about session termination, token invalidation, cookie clearing, authentication requirement, and response format to help AI agents understand the operation's effects and when to use it.

data.reasoning: Description is completely missing. Added details about session termination, token invalidation, cookie clearing, authentication requirement, and response format to help AI agents understand the operation's effects and when to use it.

message: Operation 'refreshToken' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is missing entirely. Added context about token generation, session extension, input requirements (valid token), and output format (new JWT token) to enable AI agents to understand when and how to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Generates a new JWT token for the authenticated user, extending the session validity. Requires a valid existing token or refresh token. Returns a new JWT token that can be used for subsequent authenticated requests.
data.reasoning: Description is missing entirely. Added context about token generation, session extension, input requirements (valid token), and output format (new JWT token) to enable AI agents to understand when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'forgotPassword' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is missing. Added details about input requirements (email), side effects (email sent with reset token), security considerations (no user enumeration), and response format to help AI agents understand the operation's purpose and effects.

data.description_suggestion: Initiates a password reset flow by sending a reset email to the specified user. Expects the user's email address as input. Generates a time-limited reset token embedded in the email link. Returns success confirmation without exposing whether the email exists. No authentication required.
data.reasoning: Description is missing. Added details about input requirements (email), side effects (email sent with reset token), security considerations (no user enumeration), and response format to help AI agents understand the operation's purpose and effects.

message: Operation 'resetPassword' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is missing. Added details about required inputs (reset token and new password), validation logic (token expiration), side effects (password update), and response format (user document and auth token) for AI agent clarity.

data.description_suggestion: Completes the password reset process using a valid reset token and new password. Expects the reset token (from email) and new password as inputs. Validates token expiration and updates the user's password. Returns the updated user document and new authentication token.
data.reasoning: Description is missing. Added details about required inputs (reset token and new password), validation logic (token expiration), side effects (password update), and response format (user document and auth token) for AI agent clarity.

Added clarification about slug-based retrieval, parameter details (field filtering, locale), and domain context (singleton resources) to improve AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'logoutFromCollection' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. Description is completely missing. Added details about session termination, token invalidation, cookie clearing, authentication requirement, and response format to help AI agents understand the operation's effects and when to use it.

data.description_suggestion: Terminates the authenticated session for the current user in the collection. Invalidates the JWT token and clears the authentication cookie. Requires valid authentication. Returns success confirmation.
data.reasoning: Description is completely missing. Added details about session termination, token invalidation, cookie clearing, authentication requirement, and response format to help AI agents understand the operation's effects and when to use it.

message: Operation 'refreshToken' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is missing entirely. Added context about token generation, session extension, input requirements (valid token), and output format (new JWT token) to enable AI agents to understand when and how to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Generates a new JWT token for the authenticated user, extending the session validity. Requires a valid existing token or refresh token. Returns a new JWT token that can be used for subsequent authenticated requests.
data.reasoning: Description is missing entirely. Added context about token generation, session extension, input requirements (valid token), and output format (new JWT token) to enable AI agents to understand when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'forgotPassword' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is missing. Added details about input requirements (email), side effects (email sent with reset token), security considerations (no user enumeration), and response format to help AI agents understand the operation's purpose and effects.

data.description_suggestion: Initiates a password reset flow by sending a reset email to the specified user. Expects the user's email address as input. Generates a time-limited reset token embedded in the email link. Returns success confirmation without exposing whether the email exists. No authentication required.
data.reasoning: Description is missing. Added details about input requirements (email), side effects (email sent with reset token), security considerations (no user enumeration), and response format to help AI agents understand the operation's purpose and effects.

message: Operation 'resetPassword' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is missing. Added details about required inputs (reset token and new password), validation logic (token expiration), side effects (password update), and response format (user document and auth token) for AI agent clarity.

data.description_suggestion: Completes the password reset process using a valid reset token and new password. Expects the reset token (from email) and new password as inputs. Validates token expiration and updates the user's password. Returns the updated user document and new authentication token.
data.reasoning: Description is missing. Added details about required inputs (reset token and new password), validation logic (token expiration), side effects (password update), and response format (user document and auth token) for AI agent clarity.

Description is too generic and lacks context about what global documents are and how they differ from collection documents. data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a single global document by its slug identifier. Supports optional field filtering and locale selection. Returns the complete global document with all configured fields. Global documents are singleton resources shared across the entire CMS instance.

Added clarification about slug-based retrieval, parameter details (field filtering, locale), and domain context (singleton resources) to improve AI agent understanding.
